entry.title: 有限元编程前期准备
entry.content:
2020.11.29 有限元编程前期准备

来源和思路

  1. 要准备自己的程序包, 这样才能更有效的更改代码完成不同的研究课题.

  2. 首先准备 possion 方程的程序包, 在推广到线弹性方程程序包.

  3. 主要是一种概念程序包, 有利于修改但是不适合运用于大规模运算.

  4. 对算法和程序通用性的理解.

  5. 有限元数据结构和思想都是类似或者一样的.

  6. 两个层次: Lin Tao 计算数学研究生入门有限元程序 (更加基础).

目标

  1. 有限元算法构造吃透, 特别是通用性.

  2. 自己从零开始构建程序包, 不借助外力不和人讨论不过早地看别人的程序.

安排与方法

逐渐积累, 在课上翻译 50%的程序, 剩下的基本补完. 石墨文档收集了一些问题.

概念化的指导性编程

将公式和程序对应起来, 牺牲大规模运算以及物理意义等, 使得修改程序时更加方便.
entry.summary:
2020.11.29 有限元编程前期准备

<

entry.title: Accelerated c++ Ex chapter 3
entry.content:
第三章 使用批量数据

Ex3.0

Compile, execute, and test the programs in this chapter.

平时成绩平均值
平时成绩均值

entry.title: Accelerated c++ Ex chapter 2
entry.content:
第二章 循环与计数

Ex2.0

Compile and run the program presented in this chapter

Ex2.1

Change the framing program so that it writes its greeting with no separation from the frame.

只要将pad的值修改为const int pad = 0;即可

Ex2.2

Change the framing program so that it uses a different amount of space to separate the sides from the greeting than it uses to separate the top and bottom borders from the greeting.

Ex2.3

Rewrite the framing program to ask the user to supply the amount of spacing to leave between the frame and the greeting.

Ex2.4

The framing program writes the mostly blank lines that separate the borders from the greeting one character at a time. Change the program so that it writes all the spaces needed in a single output expression.

Ex2.5

Write a set of ‘‘*’’ characters so that they form a square, a rectangle, and a triangle

Ex2.6

What does the following code do?

逐行打印1到10

Ex2.7

Write a program to count down from 10 to –5.

Ex2.8

Write a program to generate the product of the numbers in the range [1, 10)

Ex2.9

Write a program that asks the user to enter two numbers and tells the user which number is larger than the other

Ex2.10

Explain each of the uses of std:: in the following program:
entry.summary: 第二章 循环与计数

entry.title: Accelerated c++ Ex chapter 1
entry.content:
第一章 字符串

Ex1.0

Compile, execute, and test the programs in this chapter.

Ex1.1

Are the following definitions valid? Why or why not?

合法

Ex1.2

Are the following definitions valid? Why or why not?

第一句合法, 第二句不合法, string literal不能用加号连接.

Ex1.3

Is the following program valid? If so, what does it do? If not, why not?

都是合法的, 在作用域内定义常值string并输出其值string变量s 在作用域外被销毁对应存储空间被销毁, 所以可以在其他作用域内重新定义const string s并初始化, 这和const的要求并不矛盾.

Ex1.4

What about this one? What if we change }} to };} in the third line from the end?

有效的, 这是因为在大括号内相当于作用域中执行完就销毁不会影响前面的定义, 增加分号并不起作用.

Ex1.5

Is this program valid? If so, what does it do? If not, say why not, and rewrite it to be valid

不合法, 变量x在之前的作用域内定义之后就被销毁, 在作用域外没有定义过x

Ex1.6

What does the following program do if, when it asks you for input, you type two names (for example, Samuel Beckett)? Predict the behavior before running the program, then try it.

和两个人分别打招呼

输出:

Hello, Samuel

And what is yours? Hello, Beckett; nice to meet you too!
entry.summary: 第一章 字符串

entry.title: Accelerated c++ Ex chapter 0
entry.content:
第零章 初步

Ex0.0

Compile and run the Hello, world! program

Ex0.1

What does the following statement do?
3 + 4;

compute 3 plus 4 ; 7

Ex0.2

Write a program that, when run, writes

This (“) is a quote, and this () is a backslash.

Ex0.3

The string literal “ ” represents a tab character; different C++ implementations display tabs in different ways. Experiment with your implementation to learn how it treats tabs.

四格缩进

Ex0.4

Write a program that, when run, writes the Hello, world! program as its output.

Ex0.5

Is this a valid program? Why or why not?

不合法, 没有用{}将main函数主体包含起来;没有return语句虽然默认会是零但是最好要有

Ex0.6

Is this a valid program? Why or why not?

合法但是缺少return

Ex0.7

What about this one?

错误, 多行注释使用错误在第一个*/之后的注释并不能够被正确的注释掉

Ex0.8

…and this one?

合法, 单行注释//将所有需要注释的内容都注释掉了

注释中的/* */并没有效果

Ex0.9

What is the shortest valid program?

事实上更短的可以是

但是这是不值得提倡的做法.

Ex0.10

Rewrite the Hello, world! program so that a newline occurs everywhere that whitespace is allowed in the program.
entry.summary: 第零章 初步

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.
